advisory: July 2026. The fleet runs tollbooth-dpyc 0.59.1. Since 0.52: 0.53.x added a generic upstream-402 handler (a bare 402 means renew-subscription, distinct from x402 payment); 0.57.0 unified the identity-proof token as a single dpop_token (was proof_token / poison / proof); 0.58.0 and 0.59.0 gave claim-check async jobs an adaptive poll cadence and an optional author-declared time budget; 0.59.1 fixed the machine-to-machine certify path to send dpop_token (not the retired proof kwarg), which had blocked patron credit purchases. NETWORK MINIMUM is 0.49.0: operators below it read the legacy kind-4 bootstrap DM and cannot bootstrap against the current Authorities, which publish bootstrap config only as the NIP-33 kind-30078 replaceable event. HISTORICAL SECURITY FLOOR: v0.44.2 fixed a credential-card redemption leak (receive_credentials could echo raw values) — never run below it. NEW HOST: the network now has a second operator host, tollbooth-wasmcp (SpinOperatorHost) 0.1.5 — the Spin/WASI peer of FastMCP. tollbooth-fermyon is the first Spin operator: the same operator source as tollbooth-sample, running in WebAssembly at the edge, validated end-to-end (proof, Secure Courier, Lightning, billed call).
architecture_notes: Schema symmetry: every operator and Authority gets its own Neon schema; credentials live in an encrypted_blob column. vault_source and purchase_mode are independent axes (a sub-Authority self-provisions its Neon from env yet still certifies up). Each service reports its version in service_status from its own pyproject [project].version (installed metadata, with a from-source pyproject.toml fallback) — there is no hand-maintained version constant to drift. Standard tool bodies live in tested tollbooth.tools.* modules behind thin proof-gate shims; tool names and behavior are unchanged. Operators run on one of two hosts from the same source: FastMCP (on Prefect Horizon) or the Spin/WASI SpinOperatorHost (tollbooth-wasmcp); the Spin host carries the WASI seams (crypto component, relay bridge, nsec-only bootstrap) so the operator stays business-logic only.
